title: Multi-Purpose Sports Hall
description: 3D steel sports hall in SAP2000. Full AISC load evaluation: steel frames, rafters, bracing, beam-column connections, base plates, RC foundations. Led to PM appointment after 20% cost improvement.

title: Compressors Building
description: Steel framing for ASP with 15-ton overhead crane. SAP2000 3D model, crane runway fatigue checks, lateral stability, and RC foundations under combined industrial loads.

title: Continuous Casting Machine — Area 1
description: RC structures for billet casting facility. Ladle turret forces, high-temperature thermal gradients on thick walls and cooling chamber slabs, crack control under steelmaking demands.

title: Medium Voltage Building
client: Steelmaking Plant | FIE Co. / Metech STG
description: MV electrical room for Sarmad Abarkooh Steel Plant. Dead/live loads, heavy equipment, industrial fan vibration, seismic & soil pressure, punching shear verification.

title: Electrical Room WTP
description: Electrical building for Neyriz Steel Plant water supply. RC superstructure with live loads up to 1000 kg/m², raft & isolated footings, soil–structure interaction.

title: Access & Material Handling Platforms
description: Supporting structures for conveyors NBC05/06, hoppers HH01/02, and industrial staircases at Neyriz Steel Plant. Overturning control and lateral displacement checks.

title: Rotary Kiln & Cooler
description: Massive RC foundations for rotary kiln and cooler. Thermal loads, dynamic effects, sliding/overturning stability, and long-term settlement control.

title: Hostel
description: RC hostel modeled in ETABS with SAFE foundation design. Multi-function loading. Drift, punching shear, and serviceability checks.

title: Amphitheater
description: Steel amphitheater with box-section columns and long-span roof in ETABS. End-plate and base-plate connections. Seismic, wind, and thermal load combinations.

title: WTP & M.H Electrical Room
description: RC electrical room for DRP water treatment. ETABS superstructure, SAFE foundations, deep foundation design under heavy electrical equipment loads.

title: Pump Station Building
description: Steel frames for pump station & air compressor hall. Crane runway, bracing, roof/wall purlins, fatigue checks, and dynamic equipment effects.

title: Cooling Tower
description: RC cooling towers and water storage tanks. Hydrostatic/hydrodynamic pressures, thermal gradients, fluid–structure interaction, pile foundations, and crack width control.

title: Product Screen G6.010
description: Steel building in fired pellet handling area. Vendor load plans, heavy equipment frames, bracing, purlins, girts. RC foundations with bearing pressure and punching shear checks.

title: Sub Station No. 2
description: RC substation for high-voltage switchgear and VFD rooms. Torsional irregularity, drift control, base plate anchor bolts, heavy electrical equipment load transfer.

title: Transfer Tower TT07
client: 1.6 MTPY CDRI Plant | TANINSA​NAT / FIE Co.
description: Material handling transfer tower for cold direct reduced iron plant. Steel frame, bracing, and foundation design under combined gravity and seismic loading.

title: SAG Mill Feed
description: Conveyor trusses, self-supporting bridges, galleries and walkways for SAG mill feed system. Vibration, fatigue-sensitive components, uplift control, and pile foundation design.

title: Casting & Crushing Building
description: Steel building for ferrosilicon casting and crushing. Structural design under heavy process equipment loads, seismic actions, and industrial operational demands.

title: Residential Buildings (7 Projects)
description: Mid-rise RC residential buildings (5–8 floors). Reinforcement optimization, shear wall layouts, drift and torsion control, and optimized foundation systems.
